test_scenarios.given: A CloudFront distribution with an S3 origin that has origin_access_control_id configured
A CloudFront distribution with an S3 origin that does not have origin_access_control_id configured
A CloudFront distribution with an S3 origin that has origin_access_control_id set to null
A CloudFront distribution with an S3 origin that has origin_access_control_id set to empty string
A CloudFront distribution with multiple S3 origins, all with origin_access_control_id configured
A CloudFront distribution with multiple S3 origins, where one lacks origin_access_control_id
A CloudFront distribution with non-S3 origin (custom origin)
A CloudFront distribution with no origins defined
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass (filtered out by filter condition)
